description: A vulnerability has been found in itsourcecode Construction Management System 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /borrowed_equip_report.php of the component Parameter Handler. The manipulation of the argument Home leads to sql injection. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
